generated_oml:
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for capturing point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for capturing depth information"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthInformation
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthInformation : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data for clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth information from camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthInformation
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracksData
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track data storage"
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI and deep learning capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and model implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN model enabler for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter enabler for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler for lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance VehicleStateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for vehicle state data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing in cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance ACCComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system processing in cloud"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle speed and direction control"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance SystemUnderTest : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle built off Traxxas teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, JetsonNXAntenna, JetsonOrinNano
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands including desired speed adjustments, emergency braking signals, and enable/disable commands from the digital twin to the physical vehicle's actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system comprising Physical Twin Entity (sensor/actuator interfaces), Digital Twin Entity (data processing/control), User Entity (visualization/control UI), and Data Translation FE, implemented as ROS2 packages communicating via ROS2 network and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for ADAS development) and operation phase (optimization and health monitoring during vehicle use), covering both as-designed and as-operated representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-entity communication via ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi with ≤100 ms latency requirement per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted in cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework; ACC implementation compliant with ISO 15622."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system design with compliance to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in document."
]
